generated_oml:
instance EnvironmentalMonitoringSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors for monitoring building operations, including post-occupancy sensor data for real-time environmental monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalDataTransmitted
]

instance EnvironmentalDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnvironmentalMonitoringSensor
]

instance EnvironmentalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time environmental sensor data for building operations"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnvironmentalDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]

instance BIMModelEnriched : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM models enriched with device modeling and middleware metadata for Eclipse Hono and Ditto, providing a semantic backbone for geometric, spatial, and functional characteristics of building components and relationships."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]

instance BCSActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuators for Building Control Systems (BCS) that enable the DT to send control signals to physical building systems"
]

instance BCSController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controllers for Building Control Systems (BCS) that enable the DT to send control signals to physical building systems"
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono for device connectivity"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoring, ServiceModularExtensions
]

instance Ditto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Ditto for digital twin management"
    DTDFVocab:enables ServiceModularExtensions, PredictiveAnalytics
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 for interactive visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables InteractiveVisualization
]

instance BIMTools : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM tools for modeling and configuration"
    DTDFVocab:enables ServiceModularExtensions
]

instance RealTimeMonitoring : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring service for building operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeInsightForFacilityManagement
]

instance Simulation : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation service for building operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalytics : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for energy optimization, visual comfort, and non-visual health effects"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight, VisualComfortInsight, NonVisualHealthEffectInsight
]

instance EnergyOptimization : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization of energy consumption for building operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight
]

instance VisualComfortOptimization : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization of visual comfort for building operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualComfortInsight
]

instance InteractiveVisualization : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization using Unreal Engine 5 for building operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides InteractiveVisualizationInsight
]

instance ServiceModularExtensions : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service-oriented modular extensions for building operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModularExtensionInsight, TwinningProcessAction
]

instance RealTimeInsightForFacilityManagement : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time insights for facility management and operational decision-making"
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights from simulation services for building operations"
]

instance EnergyOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for energy optimization"
]

instance VisualComfortInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for visual comfort"
]

instance NonVisualHealthEffectInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for non-visual health effects"
]

instance InteractiveVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights from interactive visualization using Unreal Engine 5"
]

instance ModularExtensionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights from service-oriented modular extensions for building operations"
]

instance TwinningProcessAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Model-driven deployment process with automated extraction of domain semantics and generation of runtime interfaces via model-to-model and model-to-text transformations, enabling reproducible setups and future extensibility through standardized extension points."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance LivingLabBuilding : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "A building or infrastructure in the AECO domain, specifically demonstrated in a Living Lab case study for real-time monitoring, simulation, and life cycle-encompassing optimization of building operations."
    base:contains EnvironmentalMonitoringSensor, BCSActuator, BCSController
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals sent from the DT to Building Control Systems (BCS) actuators and controllers for adaptive lighting and operational adjustments, based on predictive analytics and user-centered control strategies."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with physical assets, as specified by 'real-time data exchange' and 'continuous synchronization' for monitoring and control operations."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A modular, service-oriented architecture with a central hub facilitating bidirectional data exchange, standardized extension points for integrating custom services, and support for scalable deployment across heterogeneous systems."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers the entire building life cycle from initial design to refurbishments and adaptations during operation, as supported by BIM's comprehensive representation throughout the building life cycle."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Evaluation using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric for interoperability and architectural soundness, with attention to semantic drift through synchronization techniques to ensure model integrity."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono and Ditto for real-time data exchange, enabling bidirectional communication between physical assets and digital twins; specific protocols not detailed in the document."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "BIM standards for building information modeling, Eclipse IoT standards for Hono and Ditto integration, and standardized extension points for service-oriented DT platforms."
]
